---
name: Documentation
about: Suggest improvements or additions to ATHENA documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

# Documentation Request

## Summary

Provide a short summary of the documentation update.

Example:

> Add setup instructions for Market Intelligence Service.

---

# Documentation Type

Select all that apply.

- [ ] README
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] API
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Engineering Standards
- [ ] AI Documentation
- [ ] Deployment Guide
- [ ] Runbook
- [ ] Sprint Documentation
- [ ] User Guide
- [ ] Developer Guide
- [ ] Other

---

# Problem Statement

What is currently missing or incorrect?

Examples:

- Missing explanation
- Outdated screenshots
- Incorrect API examples
- Missing deployment steps
- Broken links

---

# Proposed Improvement

Describe the documentation that should be added or updated.

---

# Affected File(s)

List the documentation files that need changes.

Example:

```text
README.md
docs/api/API_DESIGN_GUIDELINES.md
docs/database/market-schema.md
```

---

# Reason

Why is this documentation change important?

- [ ] Helps new developers
- [ ] Improves onboarding
- [ ] Prevents implementation mistakes
- [ ] Improves API understanding
- [ ] Improves architecture understanding
- [ ] Other

---

# Acceptance Criteria

Documentation is complete when:

- [ ] Accurate
- [ ] Reviewed
- [ ] Grammar checked
- [ ] Links verified
- [ ] Examples updated
- [ ] Screenshots updated (if applicable)

---

# Related Feature / Bug

Link related issue(s).

Closes #

Related #

---

# Screenshots / Diagrams

If applicable, attach screenshots or diagrams.

---

# Priority

- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

# Additional Notes

Add any additional context here.

---

# Maintainer Checklist

- [ ] Documentation reviewed
- [ ] Internal links verified
- [ ] Formatting consistent
- [ ] Markdown renders correctly
- [ ] Examples tested
- [ ] Ready to merge

---

Thank you for helping keep ATHENA documentation accurate and up to date.
